title: Encode Meshtastic incoming status events
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-t2hn.8 requires incoming LICHEN status updates to be visible to Meshtastic apps, but the current no-hardware slice only emits incoming text packets. What needs to be done: add an adapter-facing status/routing event API, encode Meshtastic ROUTING_APP ACK/NAK or equivalent app-visible status packets using the canonical vectors, and add qemu/native_sim tests for success, error, queue backpressure, and disconnected sessions.
notes:
2026-07-01 completed no-hardware status-event slice. Added lichen_meshtastic_routing_packet and lichen_meshtastic_encode_routing_packet() for Meshtastic ROUTING_APP ACK/NAK packets. Added lichen_meshtastic_incoming_status and lichen_meshtastic_adapter_emit_status() with semantics parallel to emit_text: null args -EINVAL, disconnected -ENOTCONN, missing enqueue -ENOTSUP, generated packet id/from_radio_id only committed after successful enqueue, incoming_status_count only increments on success, enqueue_fail_count handled by shared enqueue helper.

Protocol evidence: canonical vectors from test/vectors/meshtastic_app_compat.json routing_ack_for_request and routing_nak_for_request are matched exactly. ACK FromRadio bytes: 080212180d4433221115040302012207080535785634123589776655. NAK FromRadio bytes: 0803121c0d443322111504030201220b0805120218013578563412358a776655. ROUTING_APP portnum=5; Data.request_id is fixed32 field 6; NAK Data.payload contains Routing.error_reason field 3 value 1 (NO_ROUTE).

Tests/builds: git diff --check PASS. Local qemu_x86 lichen/tests/meshtastic_codec PASS 21/21; RAM 184376 B / 31 MB (0.57%). Local qemu_x86 lichen/tests/meshtastic_adapter PASS 43/43; RAM 208952 B / 31 MB (0.64%). Local qemu_x86 lichen/apps/gateway build PASS; RAM 235676 B / 31 MB (0.73%). No EC2 used for this slice because qemu_x86 coverage and gateway build ran locally.

Review evidence: explorers Hilbert/Erdos confirmed canonical ROUTING_APP shape and recommended API/test shape. Code reviews: Wegener found no codec/protobuf P0/P1/P2; Pasteur found no adapter semantics P0/P1/P2; Fermat found no test/acceptance P0/P1/P2.

Remaining parent blockers are outside this Bead: project-LICHEN-t2hn.8.2 gateway inbound event wiring and project-LICHEN-t2hn.8.3 no-hardware app-visibility smoke harness.
close_reason: Completed: Meshtastic incoming status event API and ROUTING_APP ACK/NAK encoder/tests implemented and reviewed.
